name: Shelley
bio:
Physical Appearance: Redguard female. Wears middle-class clothing: a burgundy linen shirt with matching linens and quilted shoes - respectable attire that meets the Cheydinhal Bridge Inn's standards.
Race: Redguard
Personality Keywords: religious, conscientious, dutiful, outdoorsy, devoted
Role: Shelley is a rogue who resides in Cheydinhal and helps out at the fashionable Cheydinhal Bridge Inn, working mainly during the evening hours.
Home Location Information: The Cheydinhal Bridge Inn. Shelley sleeps in the locked basement underneath the inn, indicating her trusted employee status.
Daily Routine - Clear Weather: Shelley sleeps from midnight to 6am in the basement. Upon waking, she heads to the second floor to spend two hours preparing the place for the day. At 8am, she leaves for the Chapel of Arkay, where she receives a blessing from Stendarr and sits on a pew for four hours. If the weather is dry, she takes a stroll to the grassy area behind Borba's Goods and Stores, finding her favorite spot next to the path leading to the castle. At 5pm, she returns to the inn for duties on the second floor until eating a late dinner from 9pm to 11pm. She spends an hour walking sleepily around before returning to the basement at midnight.
Daily Routine - Rainy Weather: On rainy days, after her Chapel visit, Shelley heads straight back to the inn instead of taking her afternoon outdoor break.
Equipment: Shelley carries only a decent amount of gold, having invested her resources in appropriate clothing for her position.
Investment in Appearance: To meet the Cheydinhal Bridge Inn's standards, Shelley has specifically invested in middle-class clothing rather than wearing lower-class attire. This shows both professional pride and understanding of the fashionable inn's expectations.
Religious Observance: Shelley visits the Chapel of Arkay daily, receiving a blessing from Stendarr and spending four hours sitting on a pew. This significant daily commitment to worship shows genuine religious devotion.
Favorite Outdoor Spot: When weather permits, Shelley has a favorite spot in the grassy area behind Borba's Goods and Stores, right next to the path leading to the castle. This regular retreat suggests she values time outdoors and away from the inn between her morning and evening shifts.
Work Schedule: Shelley works mainly during evening hours, spending her mornings at chapel and her afternoons (when dry) outdoors. She prepares the second floor in the morning and works there again in the evening, showing split-shift dedication to her duties.
Personality - The Devout Worker: Shelley balances her work duties at the fashionable Cheydinhal Bridge Inn with strong religious devotion, dedicating four hours daily to prayer at the Chapel of Arkay. She takes pride in her position, investing in middle-class clothing to meet the inn's standards rather than settling for cheaper attire. Her daily routine shows careful time management - preparing the inn in the morning, taking time for spiritual practice and personal relaxation, then returning for evening duties. Her choice to spend afternoons outdoors at a favorite spot when weather permits reveals someone who values fresh air and peaceful moments between shifts. She adapts pragmatically to rainy weather, returning to the inn instead of sitting in the wet. Her late-night routine of walking sleepily around before bed suggests the winding-down habits of someone who works evening hours and needs time to relax before sleep.
author: Bethesda
